title: Heavy Duty Flat Nail Puller Forged Steel Cats Paw Carpenters 15 Inches
description:
The Universal Tool 15 inch Flat Nail Puller is a great addition to any tool collection. This nail puller is constructed of forged steel, has a width of 35mm and is 6mm thick. Nail pullers are an essential carpenter's tool, specially designed to grip nail heads. This nail puller is essential for demolition work, but it will tear up the wood around the nail head so it is not recommended for finish work. Make sure to grab one of these before your next home improvement or woodworking project!
